violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026
Inspector observed broken glass on walk-in cooler door. Per interview with PIC, work order has been submitted. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026
Inspector observed missing ceiling tile in back storage area. Physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

Establishment did not have a person in charge that has successfully completed an approved food safety certification course. Please email inspector proof that additional employees have been enrolled and completed an approved food safety course. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2024

Self-serve empanadas, hot dogs, egg rolls, tornados, pizza and baked goods in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Signs were placed in the hot food and baked goods sections asking customers to inquire about label information. Per person in charge, establishment has label information. Per person in charge, a binder will be placed near food items with all the label information. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2024
